title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.89% today, the main contract closed at 832.5. The traders' willingnessto ship is general.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is normal.PBF at Tangshan port deal 872-873 yuan/mt,decrease 10-11yuan/mt. On the supply side, the total global shipment volume has rebounded, and the shipment volume from Australia and Brazil has increased.
